questions.question: Peter says above all, believers should love each other deeply because love covers what?
questions.feedback: Love each other deeply because love covers a multitude of sins.

questions.question: Peter says believers should not be surprised at what?
questions.feedback: Do not be surprised at the fiery trial as though something strange were happening.

questions.question: Peter says judgment begins with the family of God.
questions.feedback: It is time for judgment to begin with God's household.

questions.question: Each of you should use whatever _____ you have received to serve others.
questions.feedback: Use whatever gift you have received to serve others as faithful stewards.

questions.question: If you suffer as a Christian, do not be ashamed but _____ God that you bear that name.
questions.feedback: If you suffer as a Christian, praise God that you bear that name.
